mapper.sql: ranking_id, user_id, subject_id, scope_type, scope_key, period_type, period_key, score, rank_no, calculated_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ranking_scores ORDER BY rank_no ASC, score DESC, ranking_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ranking_scores ( user_id, subject_id, scope_type, scope_key, period_type, period_key, score, rank_no, calculated_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{subjectId}, #{scopeType}, #{scopeKey}, #{periodType}, #{periodKey}, #{score}, #{rankNo}, #{calculatedAt}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE ranking_scores SET user_id = #{userId}, subject_id = #{subjectId}, scope_type = #{scopeType}, scope_key = #{scopeKey}, period_type = #{periodType}, period_key = #{periodKey}, score = #{score}, rank_no = #{rankNo}, calculated_at = #{calculatedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE ranking_id = #{rankingId}
mapper.select: SELECT se.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS nickname, SUM(se.score_delta) AS score FROM score_events se INNER JOIN users u ON u.user_id = se.user_id WHERE se.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) DAY) AND se.reason_code NOT LIKE 'ATTENDANCE%' GROUP BY se.user_id, u.nickname ORDER BY score DESC, se.user_id ASC

SELECT se.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS nickname, SUM(se.score_delta) AS score FROM score_events se INNER JOIN users u ON u.user_id = se.user_id WHERE se.subject_id = #{subjectId} AND se.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) DAY) AND se.reason_code NOT LIKE 'ATTENDANCE%' GROUP BY se.user_id, u.nickname ORDER BY score DESC, se.user_id ASC

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(se.score_delta), 0) FROM score_events se WHERE se.user_id = #{userId} AND se.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) DAY) AND se.reason_code NOT LIKE 'ATTENDANCE%'
